calendar.matters:
MOTION For Relief From Failure To Timely File Opposition To Memorandum Of Costs And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert E. Thompson, Esq., 5543-2818, appearing for defendant/opposing party Jennifer Allen

Ruling:
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION For Relief From Failure To Timely File Opposition To Memorandum Of Costs And Motion To Tax Costs -- NO APPEARANCES FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY ON THIS MATTER AND THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS HEARING REQUIRED. The Court denied plaintiff's motion for relief from failure to timely file opposition to memorandum of costs and motion to tax costs. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/REQ/DM) Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay; Court Reporter Christina Paxton CSR 1558

MOTION For Relief From Failure To Timely File Opposition To Memorandum Of Costs And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Aug-26-2005 Continued To Sep-06-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION For Relief From Failure To Timely File Opposition To Memorandum Of Costs And Motion To Tax Costs IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2005 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
